combined_text:
--- Main Page ---
Alici
0
SPECIALIZING IN OYSTERS, SEAFOOD, & HOUSE-MADE PASTAS INSPIRED BY THE AMALFI COAST
With a focus on Mediterranean cuisine, Alici’s coastal Italian menu features a wide range of seasonal seafood-focused dishes, an extensive selection of oysters, and rotating house-made pastas, risottos, and socca.
OUR MENU
THE OYSTER BAR
🦪
THE OYSTER BAR
🦪
THE OYSTER BAR 🦪
"He was a bold man that first ate an oyster.”

rye, orgeat, banane du brasil

rum, fresh lime juice, sweetner

Capri
gin, italicus, elderflower
V I N O  P E R   T U T T I
[wine for all]
Italy has a wine for every palate, every occassion, &
every personality. If you’re not so sure what to pick, just know you can’t go wrong.
BIANCO
RIESLING TROCKEN 2022, Jonas Seckinger "Glas", Pfalz (green apple, lime, white peach)
PINOT GRIGIO 2023, "Cora" Abruzzo (crisp, citrus forward, floral)
SAUVIGNON BLANC 2024, "Via Alpina" Friuli (crisp, citrus forward, floral)
MUSCADET 2018, Chateau de Chasseloir "Comte Leloup", Loire (citrus notes, white flowers)
GRILLO 2023, Mary Taylor "Clara Sala" Sicily (like white burgundy? try this! peach, lemon, rosemary) CHENIN BLANC 2021, Gen Del Alma "Jijji" Uco Valley (orange blossom, grapefruit, green apple)
VERDEJO 2021, Martinsancho, La Seca (peach, green apple, bright acid)
CHARDONNAY 2023, Seghesio, North Coast (ripe apple, zesty, buttery)
GRILLO 2023, "Note di bianco" Alessandro Viola, Sicily (dry, mineral, apple & citrus notes)
ROSSO
RHONE BLEND NV, Anne Collard "Rock, Paper, Scissors", Rhone (berries, lavender, juicy)
PINOT NOIR 2023, "Folk Machine" Central Coast (cherries, red fruit, peppery finish)
BLAUFRANKISCH 2022, "Frankovka", Slovenia (black cherry, blackberry, green pepper)
DOLCETTO BLEND 2021, Luigi Oddero "Convento", La Morra (violet-y berry fruit, medium body)
MONTEPULCIANO D'ABRUZZO 2021, "Cirelli", Abruzzo (silky tannins, red fruit, earthy)
SUPER TUSCAN 2022, "Ampelcia" Tuscany (dry, cherry, leather, plum, spice)
CABERNET SAUVIGNON NV. Ashes & Diamonds, Napa Valley (oak, vanilla, tobacco)
ETNA ROSSO 2019 •Calderara Sottana (rich, seductive, cherry, dusty stone)
FRIZZANTE
NV Prosecco
, Giuseppe & Luigi, Friuli (apple, pears, crisp finish)
BARBERA/DOLCETTO NV, Ercole Petillant Maturel, Italy, Piedmont (raspberry, strawberry)
CAVA/TREPAT NV, Flama Roja, Spain, Cava (light, ripe strawberry, cherry, crisp)
CREMANT MV, Camille Braun, Alsace (ripe red apple, lemon zest, shortbread)
LAMBRUSCO 2021, Odyssey Vini 'Fizzolina' Emilia Romagna (green apple, pear, citrus)
ROSATO
GRENACHE/ SYRAH 2024 Gerard Bertrand "Hampton Water" (juicy with fruity & floral tones)
PRIMITIVO 2020, Guttarolo 'Amphora Rosato', Puglia (cranberry, citrus, invigorating)
SYRAH 2023, "La Siesta" Tavel, France (red fruit, licorice, spices, white pepper, citrus finish)

--- Page: /private-events ---
Private Events — Alici
0
PRIVATE EVENTS
Down to shuck.
Host your next event or celebration with Alici!
Please inquire about
reservations for 10 guests or more
. Alici is perfect for large groups looking to book out the restaurant. We have everything from a raw bar, seated and standing dining capabilities, New England Boils, Oyster Roasts, and oyster shucking activities!
Contact us for your next corporate team-building dinner, your once-in-a-lifetime rehearsal or engagement party, or your milestone birthday celebration. Come celebrate with us!
REQUEST EVENT
